node.name: gCTS Task Dependency Analyzer
node.summary: Detects cross-task object dependencies in SAP gCTS Transport Requests and recommends a safe pull order to prevent activation failures.
node.body:
gCTS Task Dependency Analyzer

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud and BTP ABAP Environment, each developer works in an isolated Task within a Transport Request. When multiple tasks contain objects that depend on each other (e.g. a class implementing an interface defined in another task), pulling only one task causes activation failures.

SAP provides no native tool to detect this. This plugin fills that gap.

Features

  • One right-click on any TR → instant dependency analysis
  • Detects CRITICAL (same-object conflict), HIGH (activation dependency), MEDIUM (type reference) risks
  • Recommends exact pull order — which tasks must be pulled together
  • Supported object types: CLAS, INTF, TABL, DTEL, DDLS, DDLX, BDEF, FUGR
  • Dedicated Eclipse View with collapsible cluster tree
  • Zest visual dependency graph (task nodes coloured by risk)
  • CSV export for audit trails and Excel review
  • Analysis history persisted to ABAP database table
  • ATC check integration — raises findings automatically

Requirements

  • Eclipse IDE for RCP and RAP Developers
  • SAP ABAP Development Tools (ADT)
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud or BTP ABAP Environment
  • ABAP class ZCL_GCTS_TR_ANALYZER deployed in your SAP system
  • ICF service /sap/bc/zgcts/analyze activated (SICF)

Installation

  1. Help → Install New Software → Add
  2. URL: https://your-org.github.io/gcts-analyzer/updatesite
  3. Select gCTS Tools for ADT → Install
  4. Deploy the ABAP backend (see documentation)
  5. Configure: Window → Preferences → gCTS Tools → Dependency Analyzer

screenshot.caption: Dependency Analysis View — cluster tree with risk colours
Zest Graph View — directed dependency graph
